pageContext.name: Shirahoshi
pageContext.description: Princess Shirahoshi, the princess of the Ryugu Kingdom and the youngest of the Neptune royal family. Megalo is a shark who lives on Fish-Man Island and he is the beloved pet of Princess Shrahoshi.  Shirahoshi and Megalo are presented as the main subjects of this beautifully detailed statue. The S shape combines all the elements together and maintains harmony and unity. The piece contains numerous small touches and details that truly exemplify it as a work of art, such as the coral and the seashell on the base material, the water spray on the surface of Megalo, and the textures on the sea kings.  Fans of One Piece won't want to miss this very special statue!
